pageContext.name: Velociraptor Letter Opener
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present the Velociraptor Letter Opener!  You might have been led to believe it's the sickle-shaped claw you should be wary of, but it's the Velociraptor's tail that means business.  Dinosaur fans don't miss your chance to add purchase this dino letter opener today!
